cells.Description of the climate: Mean monthly maximum temperature above 30 °C with mean monthly relative humidity below 55%
The temperatures usually vary between 25-35 °C in summers with mean monthly relative humidity below 55%; while in winters, temperatures vary between 20- 30 °C with monthly relative humidity above 75%
For the whole year; it has a particular season for more than six months and may experience other seasons for the remaining period.
